creator: kd-dev@pm.me
text:
Created attachment 170817
Correct the getopt string in usr.bin/units/usits.c

The 'o' and 'H' options both use 'optarg' while the getopt string states that they do not take an option argument.  When the 'o' option is used the 'output_format' variable is set to the previous value of 'optarg'.  The 'output_format' is used as the format when using printf to output the result, causing a segmentation fault when it is NULL.


How to reproduce:

printf '\n\n' | units -H m mm

Expected output:
        * 1
        / 1
Output:
        * 1000
        / 0.001


printf '\n\n' | units -o m mm

Expected output:
        * m
        / m
Output:
Segmentation fault
